source_note: Chinese hot-topic candidates are collected from public trend pages; English wording is matched to supplied official English headlines when possible, otherwise suggested neutrally.

topics.chinese_topic: 守护好中华民族文化瑰宝和自然珍宝
topics.official_english: Safeguarding the Cultural Treasures and Natural Gems of the Chinese Nation
topics.why_hot: Reflects national emphasis on cultural heritage and natural conservation, resonating with public pride.
topics.share_angle: Explain China's efforts in preserving cultural and natural heritage, and why it matters globally.

topics.chinese_topic: 这届世界杯有点太政治了
topics.official_english: This World Cup Feels Too Political
topics.why_hot: World Cup controversies spark debate on sports and politics intersection.
topics.share_angle: Discuss how political issues are overshadowing the World Cup, with examples like player bans and protests.

topics.chinese_topic: 美加墨世界杯诞生首个乌龙
topics.official_english: First Own Goal in US-Canada-Mexico World Cup
topics.why_hot: First own goal of the tournament is a notable sports moment.
topics.share_angle: Recap the match and the own goal, explaining its impact on the game.

topics.why_hot: A curated list of notable statistics from the week, appealing to data lovers.
topics.share_angle: Present interesting numbers from the week, e.g., economic data, sports stats, or social trends.

topics.chinese_topic: 名涉性侵球员世界杯命运截然不同
topics.official_english: World Cup Fates Diverge for Players Accused of Sexual Assault
topics.why_hot: Contrasting outcomes for players facing serious allegations sparks debate on justice.
topics.share_angle: Compare cases of players accused of sexual assault and their different World Cup participation statuses.

topics.chinese_topic: 雷军回应用私家车装600斤车厘子
topics.official_english: Lei Jun Responds to Using Personal Car to Transport 300 kg of Cherries
topics.why_hot: Tech CEO's quirky response to a viral anecdote humanizes a business figure.
topics.share_angle: Share Lei Jun's explanation and discuss the cultural significance of cherries in China.

topics.chinese_topic: 日本炸鸡店一锅油反复用66年
topics.official_english: Japanese Fried Chicken Shop Uses Same Oil for 66 Years
topics.why_hot: Unusual food practice sparks curiosity and health concerns.
topics.share_angle: Explore the story behind the shop, the science of reused oil, and cultural attitudes toward food.

topics.chinese_topic: 燃油车反击新能源车 成本催升订单
topics.official_english: Gasoline Vehicles Fight Back Against New Energy Vehicles as Costs Boost Orders
topics.why_hot: Shift in auto market dynamics affects consumers and industry.
topics.share_angle: Analyze why gasoline car orders are rising due to cost factors, and what it means for EV adoption.
